name: Pina Colada Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice bananas crosswise.
2. In a blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine half of the Pina Colada drink mix, pineapple juice, milk, cream of coconut, and banana slices. Process until pureed; pour into a 6-cup bowl.
3. Puree remaining half of liquid ingredients and banana slices with eggs and liqueur in another blender or food processor. Combine both purees.
4. In a separate container, combine raisins and crushed pineapple with juice; set aside.
5. Place about 2/3 of bread cubes in the crockpot. Sprinkle half teaspoon grated lemon peel and spread one cup of the raisin mixture over the bread in the slow cooker.
6. Top with remaining bread cubes, then the remaining lemon peel and raisin-pineapple mixture.
7. Pour pureed ingredients into the slow cooker.
8. Cover and cook on low for 6 hours.
9. Spoon pudding into dessert dishes and serve hot. Garnish with mint. If you prefer to serve this dessert cold, spoon into a serving dish, cover, and refrigerate; then eat later.
